4ddc8c25d8d90149f5c50a3e71a64174: For a mid-level Frontend Web Developer role focused on HTML5 and JavaScript, prioritize **Automata Front End**—it’s the only simulation that directly tests hands-on coding in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, which aligns perfectly with the role’s core tasks. Pair it with the **JavaScript (New)** and **HTML5 (New)** knowledge tests to validate foundational expertise. Skip personality or general ability tests unless you also want to assess cultural fit or problem-solving style.
